violations.description: Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. - Several spray bottles need labeling to identify contents.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Wall mounted fan requires more frequent cleaning. Has an accumulation of dust on the fan guards. - Doors and fronts of coolers and upright freezers in need of cleaning. - Handle of prep table door in need of repair.
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
